content.text:
Continue the live Dispatch inbox drill as the WORKER app session.

Run exactly:

```bash
cd /Users/neonwatty/Desktop/codex-terminal-manager
scripts/workerctl worker-inbox live-codex-app-inbox-20260530 --consume-next --json | tee artifacts/live-codex-app-inbox-drill-20260530/commands/12-worker-consume-by-app-session.json
python3 -m json.tool artifacts/live-codex-app-inbox-drill-20260530/commands/12-worker-consume-by-app-session.json >/dev/null
```

Then, based on the consumed dispatcher message, acknowledge that manager-to-worker pull delivery worked. Your final response should include:
- Status: WORKER_CONSUMED
- Whether JSON validation passed
- The consumed message/correlation id in brief
- A one-sentence completion note saying manager-to-worker pull delivery worked

Do not modify production code. Do not stage or commit.
